text:
👋 Hello! I'm your **HERB Business Assistant** — your go-to analyst for everything across our 530-person organization.

Here's a quick look at what I can help you with:

| Capability | Details |
|---|---|
| 👥 **Employee Directory** | 530 employees across 5 departments |
| 🤝 **Customer Analytics** | 120 customers, 4 regions, 3 tiers |
| 📦 **Product Catalog** | 30 products (platform, add-ons, services) |
| 📚 **Internal Knowledge Base** | 20 Q&A pairs on policies & processes |

Whether you need a headcount breakdown, want to flag churn-risk accounts, explore product performance, or look up a company policy — I've got you covered.

**What can I help you with today?**
Use the exec tool to calculate fib(10) and fib(20). Show me results.
Sure! Let me run both calculations in one shot.
